posts.author: Jagadeesh_J
posts.community: Just Dial: First Mover of Indian Local Search Market
posts.text: Why is there a sudden ~40% jump in just two days? Q1 results are pretty ok only. In fact, the operating margin is down YoY. Just that there is no mark-to-market loss on the bond investment, which, anyway, is just notional. As usual, no concal, no announcement on the dividend or other investment with the cash available. I don’t see much changing in how they operate after the appointments of the new CEO and CFO. Please let me know of any other developments if I have missed anything. Disclosure: Invested.

posts.author: nav_1996
posts.community: Just Dial: First Mover of Indian Local Search Market
posts.text: They were bought for their operating assets by respective line of business. These are too small to even garner attention of Reliance management. Usual instruction for acquired company would be to maintain status quo and follow instructions of mid management of line of business for any integration of operations. (Just to give a perspective, even Just Dial is sold by Reliance , it can not even cover costs of Anant Ambani’s marriage)

posts.author: paraacbe
posts.community: Just Dial: First Mover of Indian Local Search Market
posts.text: After a long time,seems to be some action on the leader ship front VSS mani is stepping down and a young guy with solid ecommerce background is stepping in his place . Justdial Posts ₹166 Cr Profit In Q1, CEO VSS Mani To Step Down
